summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Live Teaching feature with Jitsi Meet integration. All 19 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed for session creation, Go Live, Join, End, Delete, and filter functionality.
critical_code_review_comments: Live Sessions API properly implements RBAC - only faculty+ can create sessions
Session state management (scheduled -> live -> ended) works correctly
Room name generation uses SHA256 hash for unique Jitsi room names
Sidebar correctly hides on /live/:sessionId routes for immersive experience
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
MongoDB _id properly excluded from API responses

test_credentials.test_users_created: Test users (faculty, student, admin) created directly in MongoDB with TEST_ prefix, cleaned up after tests

seed_data_creation: Test users and sessions created with TEST_ and UI_TEST_ prefixes, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Live Teaching feature fully tested. Backend tests cover: session CRUD, RBAC (faculty can create, student cannot), state management (start/join/end), delete permissions (host/admin only), course linking. Frontend tests cover: Live Teaching nav in sidebar, session list with filters, New Session button visibility (faculty only), session creation dialog, Go Live/Join/Rejoin/End buttons based on role and status, Live Room page with Jitsi container and top bar, sidebar hiding on live room page.

frontend: Dashboard loads with sidebar showing Live Teaching nav - PASSED
Live Sessions page loads with filters (All, Live Now, Upcoming, Past) - PASSED
New Session button visible for faculty - PASSED
New Session button NOT visible for student - PASSED
Session creation dialog opens with title, description, course select, schedule inputs - PASSED
Session creation works and session appears in list - PASSED
Go Live button visible for host on scheduled session - PASSED
Go Live navigates to Live Room page - PASSED
Live Room page shows top bar with title, host info, participant count - PASSED
End Session button visible for host - PASSED
Sidebar hidden on Live Room page - PASSED
Student can see Join button for live sessions - PASSED
Student cannot see New Session, Go Live, Delete buttons - PASSED
Student can join live session - PASSED
Student sees Leave button (not End Session) in Live Room - PASSED
End Session changes status to 'ended' - PASSED
Delete session works for host - PASSED

backend_endpoints.POST /api/live-sessions/{id}/join (non-l: Cannot join non-live as non-host (400) - WORKING

notes.jitsi_integration: Jitsi Meet is external (meet.jit.si) - actual video cannot be tested in headless browser, but UI elements, navigation, and API flows are validated. The Jitsi container shows 'Setting up your classroom...' loading state which is expected in headless mode.
